title: Input schema of the Pinterest Visual Trend Scraper

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Pinterest boards, search results, or profile pages to start scraping (e.g., https://www.pinterest.com/search/pins/?q=fashion).

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages the crawler will open per run.

scrollIterations.title: Scroll iterations
scrollIterations.description: How many times to scroll to load more pins on feed/search pages.

authMethod.title: Authentication method
authMethod.description: Set to 'cookie' to provide a Pinterest session cookie, 'credentials' for username/password login, or 'none' for unauthenticated scraping (limited).

cookieString.title: Cookie string
cookieString.description: If authMethod is 'cookie', paste your Pinterest session cookie here (store secrets in env vars on Cloud).

downloadImages.title: Download images
downloadImages.description: When true, the Actor downloads pin images to the Key-Value store under images/<pinId>.*
